name: gBLUE
description: gBLUE is an auto-rebasing token on Abstract Chain that compounds staking rewards every 4 hours regardless of which chain it resides on. As a wrapped representation of staked BLUE, the token's balance grows automatically as the underlying staking index increases, requiring no manual claims or user interaction. On Abstract Chain, gBLUE unlocks dual-stack rewards through integration with Aborean Finance. Holders can provide liquidity to earn trading fees and ABX emissions on top of their base staking yield, or deposit into autocompounding vaults that optimize returns without active management.
